:::: {#exr-u1-time-frac}
### Time and Fractions

A train is late. It should arrive at 5 pm but arrives at 5:15 pm.

a) How many minutes late is the train?  
b) Write your answer as a fraction of an hour.

::: {.callout-tip collapse="true"}
## 🔍 View Solution

a) **15 minutes** b) $\frac{15}{60} = \mathbf{\frac{1}{4}}$ of an hour
:::

::: {.exercise-meta}
[Topic: Time and Fractions]{.badge .topic-badge}
[Skills: Fraction Simplification]{.badge .skill-badge}

:::
::::
